title: erlangea calycina
intro:
Erlangea calycina is a plant species that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Erlangea or Cape daisy. It is native to the southern parts of Africa, particularly in South Africa and Namibia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Erlangea calycina include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. 

Herbal preparations of Erlangea calycina include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits. However, more research is needed to fully understand the extent of its medicinal properties and to establish its safety and efficacy for human use.
